The specific sub-goal that fails is:

where `S := pbar.inner pc.S` and `f := rotproj_inner_unit S w`.

2.  Explicitly compute the derivative `nth_partial 2 f p` using `HasFDerivAt` and related lemmas.
3.  Show that this derivative equals `inner ‚ĄĚ (pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM‚āĀŌÜ S) w) / ‚ÄĖS‚ÄĖ`.

max_{P} ‚ü™ R(őĪ) M(őł‚āĀ, ŌÜ‚āĀ), P, w ‚üę < max_{P} ‚ü™ M(őł‚āā, ŌÜ‚āā), P, w ‚üę"
-/
theorem global_theorem_le_reasoning (p : Pose)
    (poly : GoodPoly)
    (h_rupert : RupertPose p (convexHull ‚ĄĚ poly.vertices)) (w : ‚ĄĚ¬≤) :
    maxInner p poly w ‚Č§ maxOuter p poly w
    := by
  simp only [maxInner]
  refine Finset.max'_le _ _ _ ?_
  intro y hy
  simp only [maxOuter, imgOuter]
  simp only [imgInner, Finset.mem_image] at hy
  obtain ‚ü®v, ‚ü®hv, hv'‚ü©‚ü© := hy
  rw [‚Üź hv']
  clear hv'
  change ‚ü™w, p.inner v‚üę ‚Č§ (poly.vertices.image (‚ü™w, p.outer ¬∑‚üę)).max' _
  convert_to ‚ü™w, p.inner v‚üę ‚Č§ ((poly.vertices.image p.outer).image (‚ü™w, ¬∑‚üę)).max' (by
      simp only [Finset.image_nonempty]; exact poly.nonempty)
  ¬∑ simp [Finset.image_image]; rfl
  let S := p.inner v
  let V := poly.vertices.image p.outer
  have Vne : V.Nonempty := by simp only [V, Finset.image_nonempty]; exact poly.nonempty
  change ‚ü™w, S‚üę ‚Č§ Finset.max' (V.image (‚ü™w, ¬∑‚üę)) _
  refine hull_scalar_prod V Vne S ?_ w
  simp only [Finset.coe_image, V, S]
  exact p.is_rupert_imp_inner_in_outer poly.vertices h_rupert v hv

    (pc : GlobalTheoremPrecondition poly pbar őĶ) :
    (fderiv ‚ĄĚ (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1) =
    ‚ÄĖpc.S‚ÄĖ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * ‚ü™pbar.rotR' (pbar.rotM‚āĀ pc.S), pc.w‚üę  := by
  have := pc.norm_S_ne_zero
  change (fderiv ‚ĄĚ (őĽ x => rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w x) _) _ = _
  unfold rotproj_inner_unit rotprojRM

  convert_to (fderiv ‚ĄĚ (‚ÄĖpc.S‚ÄĖ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ ‚ÄĘ (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w)) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1) = _
